evals.expected_output: Reads greeter/SKILL.md, confirms it is not already disabled, prepends 'Disabled. ' to the description, and reports success. No other content is changed.
assertions: Reads the SKILL.md before editing
Prepends exactly 'Disabled. ' (capital D, period, space) to the description
Does not modify the skill body or any other field
Reports that the skill is now disabled

evals.expected_output: Reads greeter/SKILL.md, confirms it starts with 'Disabled. ', removes that prefix from the description, and reports success. No other content is changed.
assertions: Reads the SKILL.md before editing
Removes exactly the leading 'Disabled. ' from the description
Does not modify the skill body or any other field
Reports that the skill is now enabled

evals.prompt: Disable the greeter skill (it is already disabled).
evals.expected_output: Reads greeter/SKILL.md, detects the description already starts with 'Disabled. ', and reports it is already disabled without making any changes.
assertions: Reads the SKILL.md before acting
Detects the skill is already disabled
Makes no changes to the file
Reports the skill is already disabled

evals.prompt: Is the greeter skill currently enabled or disabled?
evals.expected_output: Reads greeter/SKILL.md, checks whether the description starts with 'Disabled. ', and reports the current state along with the description value.
assertions: Reads the SKILL.md before answering
Correctly identifies enabled or disabled based on the 'Disabled. ' prefix
Shows the current description so the user can verify
Makes no changes to the file

evals.prompt: Enable a skill whose description reads: 'This skill is currently disabled. Use when reviewing CSS files.'
evals.expected_output: Detects the skill is implicitly disabled (no 'Disabled. ' prefix but description states it is disabled). Rewrites the description removing the disabled indication, resulting in something like 'Use when reviewing CSS files.' No other content is changed.
assertions: Detects the implicit disabled state from the description text
Rewrites the description to remove the disabled language without asking the user
The resulting description no longer contains any indication the skill is disabled
Does not modify the skill body or any other field
Reports the new enabled description

evals.prompt: Check if a skill whose description reads: 'Not active. Handles database migrations.' is disabled.
evals.expected_output: Reads the SKILL.md, does not find the 'Disabled. ' prefix, but detects the description text implies the skill is disabled. Reports it as disabled via implicit description and shows the current description.
assertions: Reads the SKILL.md before answering
Does not find the 'Disabled. ' prefix
Still correctly identifies the skill as disabled based on description text
Reports which detection method matched (implicit)
Makes no changes to the file

evals.prompt: Disable a skill that was just enabled from an implicit disabled state (description is now 'Handles database migrations.').
evals.expected_output: Prepends 'Disabled. ' to the description — does not restore any previous implicit wording. Result: 'Disabled. Handles database migrations.'
assertions: Prepends exactly 'Disabled. ' to the current description
Does not attempt to restore any previous implicit disabled wording
Does not modify the skill body or any other field
Reports that the skill is now disabled
